meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 30: The Geopolitics of the Coronavirus
meta.description:
Hudson Senior Fellows Michael Doran, Peter Rough, and John Lee join The Realignment to explore the geopolitical ramifications of the Coronavirus outbreak in the Middle East, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
